code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn is_digit_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b >= 48 and b <= 57
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)

  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut start = i
      let first = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        b
      when None
        0
      end
      if first == 43 or first == 45
        i = i + 1
      end
      while i < n and is_digit_at(line, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      product = product * v
    end
  end

  println("product=#{product}")
end
